LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.description: Discover basic recycling, giving you the ability to recycle wastepacks into a variety of different resources.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.label: basic recycling
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.description: Learn to recycle isotopacks and alloypacks into new resources and build garbage compactors to craft trashbricks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.label: complex recycling
